== Notes for [[Item:Q104633|Q104633]] ==

5. DIEGO3 DE MORALES (JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*He married LUISA DE-LA-FUENTE-FLORES-DE-VALDEZ,
**daughter of JOSEPH DE-LA-FUENTES and LUISA FLORES-DE-VALDEZ-SALAZAR.

Children of DIEGO DE MORALES and LUISA DE-LA-FUENTE-FLORES-DE-VALDEZ are:
*1. 25. i. ANDRES4 DE MORALES-DE-LA-FUENTE,
**b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico;
**d. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.
*2. 26. ii. MANUEL DE MORALES.
*3. 27. iii. ANTONIO DE MORALES-SALAZAR,
**b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.
*4. 28. iv. CRISTOBAL DE MORALES,
**b. 1678, Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico.
*5. 29. v. JUANA DE MORALES,
**b. 1678.
*6. 30. vi. MARIA DE MORALES,
**b. 1679

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000010110336261

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
